S.FORM: Stacey Arceneaux sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 2, Stacey Arceneaux, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2015) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~…ïta ¶~ ®ej ar ¶~ ®eneaux s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ïta ¶~ ®ej ar ¶~ ®eneaux, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
